Abstract: Source: Higa, A. et al. High-Throughput In Vitro Assay using Patient-Derived Tumor Organoids. J. Vis. Exp. (2021) In this video, we demonstrate a rapid, single-addition assay to assess cell viability in patient-derived organoids upon treatment with a test agent using intracellular ATP levels as a marker for cellular metabolic activity. The intracellular ATP levels are measured using the luciferase/luciferin reaction, where the emitted light intensity indicates the cellular viability and, in turn, the test agent's growth-inhibitory potency.
